honk-blue.$description: Honk Blue — Full-viewport page canvas, hero background, all top-level sections — the electric blue IS the brand surface, not a secondary accent

honk-sky.$description: Honk Sky — Secondary blue for gradient bands, large decorative shapes, and depth layers behind the primary canvas

signal-yellow.$description: Signal Yellow — Accent words inside headlines, heading border underlines, and highlight punctuation — the only chromatic accent on the blue field, used sparingly for emphasis rather than decoration

honk-white.$description: Honk White — Hairline borders, dividers, input outlines, and card edges on light surfaces. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

carbon.$description: Carbon — Primary text on light surfaces, dark borders, near-black detail work — used where text leaves the blue field

true-black.$description: True Black — SVG fills, graphic detail, maximum-contrast text where the design needs to drop to absolute black

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary graphic fills, dark illustration detail, softer-than-black accents in SVG work

game-green.$description: Game Green — Phone screen content (in-game UI inside device mockups) — a single-hue secondary color reserved for product-internal screens so the blue/yellow/white trio stays clean on the marketing surface

honk-header.$description: Hero and section display headlines — custom heavy display face at a single 52px size, tightly tracked at -0.012em. This is the signature wordmark voice: chunky, loud, slightly condensed, designed to read at billboard scale on the blue field

honk-sans.$description: Body copy, sub-headings, button labels, link text, footer, icons — a neutral grotesk covering the full UI scale from 13px micro-labels to 19px lead paragraphs. Negative tracking across the board (-0.026em at 13px, -0.006em at 19px) tightens the grotesque to feel modern rather than airy

honk-blue-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-viewport page background, hero, section bands

honk-sky.$description: Surface level 1: Gradient depth layer, large decorative shapes

honk-white-panel.$description: Surface level 2: Notification banners, embedded UI cards, device screen bezel, icon fills
